figures.caption: Figure 1: Comparison of degradation curves: mc1 NUTS (left, Fig. 1a) vs. mc2 ADVI (right, Fig. 1b). Both methods yield nearly identical results, validating ADVI accuracy with 15× speedup.

Figure 2: Comparison of random effect distributions: mc1 NUTS (left) vs. mc2 ADVI (right). Both methods yield nearly identical bimodal distributions, confirming ADVI captures the same latent subgroup structure.

Figure 3: Comparison of pump degradation speed rankings: mc1 NUTS (left) vs. mc2 ADVI (right). Both methods yield nearly identical rankings (RMSE = 0.038), validating ADVI’s reliability for risk stratification.
